name: ESP_ERR_ULP_SIZE_TOO_BIG
comment: Program doesn't fit into RTC memory reserved for the ULP

name: ESP_ERR_ULP_INVALID_LOAD_ADDR
comment: Load address is outside of RTC memory reserved for the ULP

name: ESP_ERR_ULP_DUPLICATE_LABEL
comment: More than one label with the same number was defined

name: ESP_ERR_ULP_UNDEFINED_LABEL
comment: Branch instructions references an undefined label

name: ESP_ERR_ULP_BRANCH_OUT_OF_RANGE
comment: Branch target is out of range of B instruction (try replacing with BX)
